Slide and modal transition animations for app compositing in the Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[compositor_app_slide_transitions.c](compositor_app_slide_transitions.c.md)**: Implements slide transition animations for app compositing in the Pebble firmware.
- **[compositor_app_slide_transitions.h](compositor_app_slide_transitions.h.md)**: Functions for updating slide transition animations and retrieving transition configurations.
- **[compositor_modal_slide_transitions.c](compositor_modal_slide_transitions.c.md)**: Implements modal slide transitions for the compositor in the Pebble firmware.
- **[compositor_modal_slide_transitions.h](compositor_modal_slide_transitions.h.md)**: Allows creation and configuration of compositor transition animations for modals.
